items.title_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，编码性能更强
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8 with stronger coding performance
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布了其最新 AI 模型 Claude Opus 4.8，该版本在编码性能上有了显著提升。据 The American Bazaar 报道，新模型在编程任务中表现更出色，能够更高效地生成和调试代码。这一更新进一步巩固了 Anthropic 在 AI 领域的竞争力，尤其是在与 OpenAI 等对手的竞争中。Claude Opus 4.8 的发布预计将吸引更多开发者用户，推动 AI 辅助编程工具的发展。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8 with stronger coding performance The American Bazaar
items.why_zh: Claude Opus 4.8 的发布标志着 AI 编码能力的又一次飞跃，对开发者社区和 AI 应用生态有重要影响。
items.why_en: The release of Claude Opus 4.8 marks another leap in AI coding capabilities, significantly impacting the developer community and AI application ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 谁真正引领 AI 行业？Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元并发布 Claude Opus 4.8 引发热议
items.title_en: Who truly leads the AI industry now? Anthropic’s $965 billion valuation and Claude Opus 4.8 launch reignit
items.summary_zh: 随着 Anthropic 估值达到 9650 亿美元并发布 Claude Opus 4.8，关于谁才是 AI 行业领导者的讨论再次升温。据 The Economic Times 报道，Anthropic 的估值已超越 OpenAI，成为全球最有价值的 AI 公司之一。Claude Opus 4.8 的发布进一步展示了其技术实力，尤其是在编码性能方面的提升。这一系列动态引发了业界对 AI 领导地位重新洗牌的广泛关注。
items.summary_en: Who truly leads the AI industry now? Anthropic’s $965 billion valuation and Claude Opus 4.8 launch reignit The Economic Times
items.why_zh: Anthropic 的估值和产品发布挑战了 OpenAI 的领先地位，可能重塑 AI 行业的竞争格局。
items.why_en: Anthropic's valuation and product launch challenge OpenAI's dominance, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape of the AI industry.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 融资 650 亿美元，估值超越 OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion in latest funding round, making it more valuable than OpenAI
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 在最新一轮融资中筹集了 650 亿美元，使其估值超过 OpenAI，成为全球最有价值的 AI 公司之一。据 Yahoo Finance 报道，这笔巨额融资将用于加速 AI 模型的研发和商业化。Anthropic 的 Claude 系列模型在性能和安全性方面备受认可，此次融资进一步巩固了其在行业中的领先地位。投资者对 AI 领域的热情持续高涨，Anthropic 的估值飙升反映了市场对其技术前景的强烈信心。
items.summary_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion in latest funding round, making it more valuable than OpenAI Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: Anthropic 融资 650 亿美元并超越 OpenAI，标志着 AI 行业资本格局的重大转变。
items.why_en: Anthropic's $65 billion funding round and valuation surpassing OpenAI mark a major shift in the capital landscape of the AI industry.

items.title_zh: IBM 和 Red Hat 启动 50 亿美元开源 AI 安全计划
items.title_en: IBM and Red Hat Launch $5BN Open-Source AI Security Initiative
items.summary_zh: IBM 与 Red Hat 联合宣布启动一项价值 50 亿美元的开源 AI 安全计划。据 CX Today 报道，该计划旨在通过开源协作，加强 AI 系统的安全性，防范潜在威胁。双方将整合各自在云计算、企业软件和 AI 领域的优势，开发安全工具和最佳实践。这一举措有望推动整个行业对 AI 安全的重视，并促进开源社区在安全领域的创新。
items.summary_en: IBM and Red Hat Launch $5BN Open-Source AI Security Initiative CX Today
items.why_zh: 50 亿美元的开源 AI 安全计划凸显了行业对 AI 安全的高度重视，可能推动安全标准的建立。
items.why_en: The $5 billion open-source AI security initiative underscores the industry's focus on AI safety and may drive the establishment of security standards.

items.title_zh: AppClose 推出西班牙语支持和 AI 共育助手
items.title_en: AppClose® Launches Spanish language support and Co-Parent Assist™ -- AI Communication Guidance for Co-Parents and Family Law
items.summary_zh: AppClose 宣布推出西班牙语支持以及名为 Co-Parent Assist 的 AI 通信指导功能，专为共同父母和家庭法律场景设计。据 PR Newswire 报道，该 AI 工具旨在帮助离异或分居的父母更有效地沟通，减少冲突，并优化子女抚养安排。西班牙语支持将服务扩展到更广泛的用户群体。这一创新展示了 AI 在家庭法和育儿领域的应用潜力。
items.summary_en: AppClose® Launches Spanish language support and Co-Parent Assist™ -- AI Communication Guidance for Co-Parents and Family Law PR Newswire
items.why_zh: AI 在家庭法领域的应用展示了技术如何改善人际关系和解决实际问题。
items.why_en: AI's application in family law demonstrates how technology can improve interpersonal relationships and solve real-world problems.

items.title_zh: 下一代 LLM 智能体系统中的合作演化动力学：跨提供商的实证扩展
items.title_en: Evolutionary Dynamics of Cooperation in Next-Generation LLM Agent Systems: A Cross-Provider Empirical Extension
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究探讨了下一代大语言模型（LLM）智能体在竞争性多智能体环境中的合作行为。该研究基于 Willis 等人的基准测试，使用演化博弈论和迭代囚徒困境（IPD）框架，测试了 2025-2026 年发布的四个前沿模型：Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Pro 和 GPT-5.4 Mini。结果表明，这些新模型是否继承了前代模型的合作偏见尚待观察，但研究为理解 LLM 智能体的社会行为提供了重要视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29874v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Do next-generation LLM agents inherit the cooperative biases documented in their predecessors, or does scale and provider diversity reshape equilibrium behaviour in competitive multi-agent settings? Willis et al. established a benchmark for this question using evolutionary game theory and the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD), finding consistent cooperative biases in ChatGPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. We extend this benchmark to four frontier models released in 2025-2026 - Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4 Mini - a…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了 LLM 智能体在合作与竞争中的行为模式，对多智能体系统设计和 AI 安全有重要意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals behavioral patterns of LLM agents in cooperation and competition, crucial for multi-agent system design and AI safety.

items.title_zh: 告别 K-means：用于高效多向量检索的单阶段稀疏编码
items.title_en: No More K-means:Single-Stage Sparse Coding for Efficient Multi-Vector Retrieval
items.summary_zh: 多向量检索模型（如 ColBERT）通过保留细粒度 token 级交互实现了高精度，但存储和检索效率成为瓶颈。现有系统依赖降维和 K-means 聚类，导致索引延迟和计算开销。本文提出一种单阶段稀疏编码方法，无需 K-means 聚类，直接生成稀疏表示，大幅降低存储和计算成本。实验表明，该方法在保持检索精度的同时，显著提升了效率，为大规模多向量检索提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30120v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multi-vector retrieval (MVR) models, exemplified by ColBERT, have established new benchmarks in retrieval accuracy by preserving fine-grained token-level interactions. However, this granularity imposes prohibitive storage and retrieval efficiency bottlenecks: to manage the immense memory footprint and computational overhead of billion-scale token vectors, state-of-the-art systems are forced to rely on aggressive dimension reduction and complex clustering (e.g., K-means). This compromise introduces two critical limitations: excessive indexing la…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了多向量检索的效率瓶颈，对大规模信息检索系统有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This research addresses the efficiency bottleneck in multi-vector retrieval, with significant implications for large-scale information retrieval systems.

items.title_zh: CodeEvolve：用于算法发现和优化的开源演化编码智能体
items.title_en: CodeEvolve: an open source evolutionary coding agent for algorithmic discovery and optimization
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出了 CodeEvolve，一个开源框架，将大语言模型与岛屿演化搜索相结合，用于端到端的算法发现。CodeEvolve 集成了灵感交叉、元提示和深度优化，基于 CVT-MAP-Elites 档案和加权 LLM 集成，为复杂问题生成优化解决方案。在 AlphaEvolve 基准测试中，CodeEvolve 在 9 个问题中的 5 个上匹配或超越了 AlphaEvolve 的结果，并在同等条件下优于其他开源方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.14150v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce CodeEvolve, an open-source framework that couples large language models with island-based evolutionary search for end-to-end algorithmic discovery. CodeEvolve integrates inspiration-based crossover, meta-prompting, and depth-based refinement on top of a CVT-MAP-Elites archive and a weighted LLM ensemble to generate optimized solutions for complex problems. On the AlphaEvolve benchmark suite, CodeEvolve matches or surpasses the reported AlphaEvolve results on 5 of 9 problems and, under matched conditions, outperforms the open-sour…
items.why_zh: CodeEvolve 展示了 LLM 与演化算法结合的巨大潜力，为自动化算法发现提供了强大工具。
items.why_en: CodeEvolve demonstrates the potential of combining LLMs with evolutionary algorithms, providing a powerful tool for automated algorithmic discovery.

items.title_zh: JMed48k：面向视觉语言模型评估的多职业日本医疗执照基准
items.title_en: JMed48k: A Multi-Profession Japanese Medical Licensing Benchmark for Vision-Language Model Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出了JMed48k，这是一个用于评估视觉语言模型的多职业日本医疗执照基准。该基准基于日本厚生劳动省发布的官方PDF材料构建，包含2005年至2025年间11个国家执照考试的48,862道试题和20,142张图像，视觉内容按8类分类法进行标注。从该语料库中，研究人员提取了JMed48k-Eval，一个近五年的评估子集，包含12,484道计分题，其中9,905道为纯文本题。该基准旨在推动视觉语言模型在医疗领域的评估与发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.22080v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce JMed48k, a multi-profession Japanese healthcare licensing benchmark for evaluating vision-language models. Built from official PDF materials released by the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, JMed48k contains 48,862 exam questions and 20,142 images from 11 national licensing examinations between 2005 and 2025, with visual content annotated under an 8-type taxonomy. From this corpus, we derive JMed48k-Eval, a recent five-year evaluation subset with 12,484 scored questions, including 9,905 text-only questions an…
items.why_zh: 该基准为视觉语言模型在医疗领域的评估提供了标准化测试集，有助于推动AI在医疗执照考试中的应用。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a standardized evaluation set for vision-language models in healthcare, advancing AI applications in medical licensing exams.

items.title_zh: 通过蒸馏和量化扩展Apertus LLM家族
items.title_en: Apertus LLM Family Expansion via Distillation and Quantization
items.summary_zh: 论文验证了蒸馏和量化作为扩展大语言模型家族到新规模和硬件约束的经济有效方法。随着LLM在聊天助手和数据标注等广泛应用中的普及，模型需要满足预算和硬件限制，因此出现了以不同规模批量发布相似模型的趋势。该研究通过蒸馏和量化技术，以低成本方式扩展模型家族，使其适应更广泛的约束条件。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29128v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The wide adoption of LLMs has led to their use in great variety of applications and scenarios, such as chatbot assistants and data annotation, creating the need for the models to satisfy certain budget and hardware constraints. This has led to the trend of LLMs being released in batches consisting of similar models of various sizes for the family of models to adhere to as wide of a range of constraints as possible. In this paper, we validate distillation and quantization as a cost-effective way to expand model families to new sizes and hardware f…
items.why_zh: 该研究提供了一种经济高效的方式扩展LLM家族，使其适应不同硬件和预算约束，有助于LLM的广泛部署。
items.why_en: This research offers a cost-effective way to expand LLM families for diverse hardware and budget constraints, facilitating widespread deployment.

items.title_zh: 通过激活感知初始化实现大语言模型的推理保持高效蒸馏
items.title_en: Reasoning-preserved Efficient Distillation of Large Language Models via Activation-aware Initialization
items.summary_zh: 高效蒸馏（EDistill）通过结构化剪枝参数和调优轻量模块来压缩大语言模型，具有高训练效率。然而，研究发现这些EDistill模型在多步推理能力上出现严重退化，称为推理崩溃。论文系统分析了推理崩溃的几何起源，并指出基于宽度缩减的SOTA EDistill方法存在问题。为此，提出了一种激活感知初始化方法，以保持推理能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29327v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Efficient Distillation (EDistill) compresses large language models (LLMs) by structured pruning parameters and tuning lightweight modules with high training efficiency. Although these EDistilled LLMs achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on general ability benchmarks relative to similarly sized LLMs, we identify a severe degradation in their multi-step reasoning ability, which we term reasoning collapse. We systematically analyze the geometric origins of reasoning collapse and show that the SOTA EDistill method based on width-reducing pro…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了高效蒸馏中的推理崩溃问题，并提出了解决方案，对于保持压缩后LLM的推理能力至关重要。
items.why_en: This work identifies and addresses reasoning collapse in efficient distillation, crucial for preserving reasoning capabilities in compressed LLMs.

items.title_zh: Microsoft 365 Copilot获得速度提升和更简洁的设计
items.title_en: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
items.summary_zh: 微软推出了重新设计的Microsoft 365 Copilot，声称加载速度提升两倍，并提供更简洁的设计。更新后的Copilot将提供更可靠、结构化的响应，便于浏览。重新设计在桌面和移动设备上推出，并引入了“渐进式披露”功能，即根据用户提示显示工具和控件，而非一次性展示所有选项。用户现在可以直接在Copilot升级后的提示框中格式化文本。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft. The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes with a feature Microsoft calls "progressive disclosure." That means Copilot will present you with tools and controls based on your prompt, instead of showing a bunch of options at once. You can now format your text directly inside Copilot's upgraded pr…
items.why_zh: 此次更新显著提升了Copilot的用户体验和性能，有助于提高办公效率。
items.why_en: This update significantly improves Copilot's user experience and performance, boosting office productivity.

items.title_zh: Oculus创始人创立的对话式AI初创公司Sesame发布iOS应用
items.title_en: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
items.summary_zh: Sesame的新iOS应用将其对话式AI代理推向公众，提供更自然的来回交互，旨在减少传统聊天机器人的感觉，更像与真人交谈。
items.summary_en: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.
items.why_zh: Sesame的iOS应用标志着对话式AI向更自然交互迈出重要一步，可能改变人机交互方式。
items.why_en: Sesame's iOS app marks a step towards more natural conversational AI, potentially transforming human-computer interaction.

items.title_zh: 最富有的投资者如何看待SpaceX和OpenAI的IPO
items.title_en: How the wealthiest investors are thinking about SpaceX, OpenAI IPOs
items.summary_zh: 雅虎财经报道了最富有的投资者对SpaceX和OpenAI首次公开募股（IPO）的看法。这些投资者正在评估这两家知名科技公司的上市前景和投资机会。
items.summary_en: How the wealthiest investors are thinking about SpaceX, OpenAI IPOs Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: SpaceX和OpenAI的IPO备受关注，顶级投资者的看法可能影响市场预期和估值。
items.why_en: The IPOs of SpaceX and OpenAI are highly anticipated; top investors' views may influence market expectations and valuations.

items.title_zh: Anthropic发布Opus 4.8，配备新的“动态工作流”工具
items.title_en: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
items.summary_zh: Anthropic发布了Opus 4.8版本，引入了新的“动态工作流”工具。该工具旨在提升AI模型的灵活性和任务处理能力。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool OODAloop
items.why_zh: Opus 4.8的发布展示了Anthropic在AI工作流自动化方面的持续创新。
items.why_en: The release of Opus 4.8 demonstrates Anthropic's ongoing innovation in AI workflow automation.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出Rosalind生物防御计划以应对大流行病
items.title_en: OpenAI unveils Rosalind Biodefense program for pandemic preparedness
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出了Rosalind生物防御计划，旨在加强大流行病的防范能力。该计划将利用AI技术提升对生物威胁的检测和响应能力。
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils Rosalind Biodefense program for pandemic preparedness seekingalpha.com
items.why_zh: 该计划展示了AI在公共卫生安全领域的应用潜力，有助于全球大流行病防范。
items.why_en: This program demonstrates AI's potential in public health security, contributing to global pandemic preparedness.

items.title_zh: 9000亿美元巨头：Anthropic如何迅速崛起
items.title_en: The $900 Billion Giant: How Anthropic Got So Big, So Fast
items.summary_zh: 据《纽约时报》报道，人工智能初创公司Anthropic估值已飙升至约9000亿美元，成为AI领域的新巨头。该公司由前OpenAI员工创立，专注于AI安全研究。其快速增长的背后是巨额融资和对AI安全技术的押注。Anthropic的崛起标志着AI行业竞争格局的深刻变化，挑战了OpenAI等先行者的地位。
items.summary_en: The $900 Billion Giant: How Anthropic Got So Big, So Fast The New York Times
items.why_zh: Anthropic的估值飙升表明AI安全领域正成为资本追逐的新热点，可能重塑行业格局。
items.why_en: Anthropic's valuation surge highlights the growing investor interest in AI safety, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape.

items.title_zh: Anthropic估值达9650亿美元，超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic's valuation surges to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 据MSN报道，Anthropic的估值已飙升至9650亿美元，超过OpenAI成为全球估值最高的AI公司之一。这一增长得益于其最近完成的巨额融资轮。Anthropic的估值超越OpenAI标志着AI行业权力格局的转变，投资者对AI安全技术的信心增强。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's valuation surges to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI MSN
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI，标志着AI安全领域获得市场认可，可能引发新一轮投资热潮。
items.why_en: Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation signals market validation for AI safety, potentially triggering a new wave of investment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic完成650亿美元融资，估值超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI In Valuation After Massive $65 Billion Funding Round
items.summary_zh: 据《国际商业时报》报道，Anthropic在完成650亿美元巨额融资后，估值超越OpenAI。这笔融资是AI领域史上最大规模之一，吸引了众多顶级投资者。Anthropic计划将资金用于扩大AI模型研发和部署，进一步巩固其在AI安全领域的领先地位。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI In Valuation After Massive $65 Billion Funding Round International Business Times
items.why_zh: 650亿美元融资创纪录，凸显投资者对AI安全赛道的强烈信心，Anthropic成为行业新标杆。
items.why_en: The record $65 billion funding round underscores strong investor confidence in AI safety, positioning Anthropic as a new industry benchmark.

items.title_zh: Anthropic联合创始人各身价80亿美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Co-Founders Worth $8 Billion Each After Funding Round
items.summary_zh: 据彭博税务报道，Anthropic联合创始人Dario Amodei和Daniela Amodei在最新融资后各自身价达到80亿美元。这轮融资使公司估值大幅提升，两位创始人持有的股份价值随之飙升。他们的财富增长反映了AI行业造富速度之快，也凸显了Anthropic在AI安全领域的成功。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Co-Founders Worth $8 Billion Each After Funding Round news.bloombergtax.com
items.why_zh: 创始人财富暴增显示AI安全领域巨大的造富效应，吸引更多人才和资本涌入。
items.why_en: The co-founders' massive wealth gain demonstrates the lucrative potential of AI safety, attracting more talent and capital.

items.title_zh: 黑石和阿波罗为Anthropic安排360亿美元芯片债务交易
items.title_en: Blackstone and Apollo line up $36 billion chip debt deal for Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 据crypto.news报道，私募股权巨头黑石集团和阿波罗全球管理公司正在为Anthropic安排一笔360亿美元的芯片债务交易。这笔资金将用于购买AI芯片，支持Anthropic的大规模模型训练。该交易表明，AI公司对算力的需求正推动金融创新，债务融资成为获取昂贵硬件的新途径。
items.summary_en: Blackstone and Apollo line up $36 billion chip debt deal for Anthropic crypto.news
items.why_zh: 360亿美元芯片债务交易创纪录，凸显AI算力需求激增，金融工具正深度介入AI基础设施。
items.why_en: The $36 billion chip debt deal highlights surging demand for AI computing power and the deepening involvement of financial instruments in AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: CHAI发布医疗系统AI治理指南
items.title_en: CHAI releases AI governance guidance for health systems
items.summary_zh: 据Healthcare Dive报道，健康人工智能联盟（CHAI）发布了针对医疗系统的AI治理指南。该指南旨在帮助医疗机构安全、负责任地部署AI技术，涵盖数据隐私、算法公平性和临床验证等关键领域。CHAI的指南为医疗AI的规范化使用提供了框架，有助于减少风险并提升患者信任。
items.summary_en: CHAI releases AI governance guidance for health systems Healthcare Dive
items.why_zh: CHAI指南为医疗AI的负责任使用提供了首个行业标准，对保障患者安全和数据隐私至关重要。
items.why_en: CHAI's guidance provides the first industry standard for responsible AI use in healthcare, crucial for patient safety and data privacy.

items.title_zh: AI伦理与监管：投资者如何应对迷宫
items.title_en: AI Ethics And Regulation: How Investors Can Navigate The Maze
items.summary_zh: 据seekingalpha.com分析，随着AI技术快速发展，伦理和监管问题日益复杂，投资者面临诸多不确定性。文章指出，投资者需要关注AI公司的治理结构、数据使用政策和合规记录。同时，全球监管趋势（如欧盟AI法案）将影响AI公司的估值和运营。投资者应优先选择在伦理和合规方面有清晰策略的公司。
items.summary_en: AI Ethics And Regulation: How Investors Can Navigate The Maze seekingalpha.com
items.why_zh: AI伦理与监管是投资决策的关键变量，忽视可能带来重大风险，重视则能发现长期价值。
items.why_en: AI ethics and regulation are critical investment factors; ignoring them poses risks while prioritizing them can uncover long-term value.

items.title_zh: AI超越数据中心：英伟达已将其变成数十亿美元业务
items.title_en: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Is Moving Beyond Data Centers. Nvidia Has Already Turned This Opportunity Into a Multibillion-Dollar Business
items.summary_zh: 据The Motley Fool报道，AI应用正从数据中心扩展到边缘设备，如自动驾驶汽车、机器人和物联网设备。英伟达已抓住这一机遇，其边缘AI芯片业务已成长为数十亿美元规模。随着AI推理在设备端的需求增长，英伟达的GPU和Jetson平台在边缘计算领域占据领先地位。这一趋势将推动AI更广泛地融入日常生活。
items.summary_en: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Is Moving Beyond Data Centers. Nvidia Has Already Turned This Opportunity Into a Multibillion-Dollar Business The Motley Fool
items.why_zh: AI向边缘设备迁移是重要趋势，英伟达的先发优势将巩固其AI硬件领导地位，并开辟新增长点。
items.why_en: The shift of AI to edge devices is a major trend; Nvidia's early lead will solidify its hardware dominance and open new growth avenues.

items.title_zh: Anthropic估值9650亿美元，超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic's $965 Billion Valuation Eclipses OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司Anthropic的估值已达到9650亿美元，超过了OpenAI。这一估值反映了投资者对Anthropic在AI安全与前沿模型开发方面的信心。Anthropic由前OpenAI员工创立，专注于构建可靠且可控的AI系统。此次估值跃升标志着AI领域竞争格局的重大变化，Anthropic成为新的领军者之一。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's $965 Billion Valuation Eclipses OpenAI TradingView
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI，标志着AI行业领导地位的重大转变。
items.why_en: Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation signals a major shift in AI industry leadership.

items.title_zh: 追逐4000亿美元目标：谷歌新AI云公司威胁英伟达和CoreWeave
items.title_en: Chasing a $400 Billion Prize: Google's New AI Cloud Company Is a Threat to Nvidia and CoreWeave
items.summary_zh: 谷歌成立了一家新的AI云公司，旨在争夺价值4000亿美元的AI云市场。此举直接威胁到英伟达和CoreWeave等现有云服务提供商。新公司将利用谷歌的TPU和AI基础设施，提供定制化的AI计算服务。这可能会重塑AI云服务格局，加剧市场竞争。
items.summary_en: Chasing a $400 Billion Prize: Google's New AI Cloud Company Is a Threat to Nvidia and CoreWeave Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 谷歌新AI云公司可能颠覆现有AI云服务市场，对英伟达等巨头构成直接竞争。
items.why_en: Google's new AI cloud venture could disrupt the AI cloud market, directly competing with Nvidia and others.

items.title_zh: OpenAI向日本银行提供最新模型访问权限
items.title_en: OpenAI gives Japan banks access to latest model, finance minister says
items.summary_zh: 日本财务大臣表示，OpenAI已向日本银行提供其最新AI模型的访问权限。此举旨在帮助日本金融机构提升效率和服务质量。OpenAI与日本政府的合作可能加速AI在金融领域的应用，并加强两国在AI技术上的联系。
items.summary_en: OpenAI gives Japan banks access to latest model, finance minister says Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: OpenAI与日本银行的合作标志着AI在金融领域应用的重要进展。
items.why_en: OpenAI's partnership with Japanese banks marks a significant step in AI adoption in finance.

items.title_zh: Anthropic估值飙升至9650亿美元，在AI融资竞赛中超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic Soars to $965 Billion Valuation, Overtaking OpenAI in AI Funding Race
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的估值飙升至9650亿美元，在AI融资竞赛中超越了OpenAI。这一成就得益于其强大的技术实力和对AI安全的重视。Anthropic由前OpenAI研究人员创立，致力于开发更安全的AI系统。此次估值超越凸显了市场对AI安全方向的认可。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Soars to $965 Billion Valuation, Overtaking OpenAI in AI Funding Race inc.com
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI，凸显了AI安全方向的市场价值。
items.why_en: Anthropic surpassing OpenAI underscores the market value of AI safety.

items.title_zh: Jony Ive设计的法拉利首款电动车Luce亮相
items.title_en: Jony Ive’s funky Ferrari
items.summary_zh: 法拉利首款电动车Ferrari Luce由著名设计师Jony Ive操刀，外观独特，融合了多项新技术。尽管大多数人可能永远无法拥有或驾驶它，但Luce无疑是今年最有趣、最令人惊讶的汽车之一。其非传统设计引发了不少争议，但也代表了法拉利在电动化时代的大胆尝试。
items.summary_en: Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce . (If you can, or do… hit us up.) There's still no question that Ferrari's first electric vehicle is one of the most interesting, surprising cars of the year. With a decidedly un-Ferrari look , and lots of new technology and designs courtesy of Sir Jony Ive, the Luce is a lot of big ideas in a single swoopy package. A lot of people really hate it . Verge subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Vergecast wherever you get your podcasts. Head here . Not a subscriber? You can sign up here . On this episode o…
items.why_zh: Jony Ive设计的法拉利首款电动车标志着传统超跑品牌向电动化转型的重要一步。
items.why_en: Jony Ive's design for Ferrari's first EV marks a significant step in the brand's electrification.

items.title_zh: 马斯克言论与IPO文件不符，SpaceX怀疑论者担忧加剧
items.title_en: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
items.summary_zh: SpaceX的怀疑论者有了更多担忧的理由，因为埃隆·马斯克的公开言论与公司IPO文件中的内容存在出入。这种不一致可能引发投资者对SpaceX透明度和治理的质疑。尽管SpaceX尚未上市，但相关争议可能影响其未来融资和市场信任。
items.summary_en: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing CNBC
items.why_zh: 马斯克言论与IPO文件不符可能损害SpaceX的投资者信任。
items.why_en: Inconsistencies between Musk's comments and IPO filing could undermine investor trust in SpaceX.

items.title_zh: 康涅狄格州AI法律标志就业AI监管新阶段
items.title_en: Connecticut’s AI Law Signals A New Phase Of Employment AI Regulation
items.summary_zh: 康涅狄格州通过了一项新的AI法律，标志着就业领域AI监管进入新阶段。该法律旨在规范AI在招聘、晋升等决策中的使用，防止算法歧视。这反映了美国各州对AI伦理和公平性的日益关注，可能为其他州的立法提供参考。
items.summary_en: Connecticut’s AI Law Signals A New Phase Of Employment AI Regulation Forbes
items.why_zh: 康涅狄格州AI法律为就业AI监管树立了先例，影响深远。
items.why_en: Connecticut's AI law sets a precedent for employment AI regulation with broad implications.

items.title_zh: AI初创公司Shift免费清洁房屋以训练机器人
items.title_en: This AI startup will clean your home for free to train future robots
items.summary_zh: AI训练初创公司Shift提供免费家庭清洁服务，但会记录清洁过程用于训练机器人。该公司表示，清洁产生的训练数据价值足以覆盖服务成本。用户获得干净的公寓，Shift获得训练数据，实现双赢。这一模式展示了数据收集的创新方式，但也引发了隐私担忧。
items.summary_en: AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. The catch - because, despite what its website says, there's always a catch - is that it will record cleaners as they scrub, vacuum, dust, tidy, and wash, and use that footage to train robots. Shift announced the unusual offer on social media on Thursday, explaining that the value of the training data generated from the cleanings is more than enough to fund the service. As its website puts it: "You get a spotless apartment. We get training data. Everyone wins." A promotional video shows a cleaner in a crisp white uniform and awkward-l…
items.why_zh: Shift的免费清洁服务展示了AI训练数据收集的创新模式，但引发隐私争议。
items.why_en: Shift's free cleaning service highlights an innovative data collection model for AI training, but raises privacy concerns.

items.title_zh: OpenAI、Anthropic CEO 在 IPO 临近时淡化 AI 取代工作的警告
items.title_en: OpenAI, Anthropic CEOs walk back AI job warnings as IPOs loom
items.summary_zh: 随着 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 可能进行首次公开募股（IPO），两家公司的 CEO 开始淡化此前关于 AI 将取代大量工作的警告。此前他们曾公开表示 AI 可能导致大规模失业，但现在态度有所转变，强调 AI 将创造新岗位而非仅仅取代旧岗位。这一变化被解读为在上市前安抚投资者和公众情绪。分析人士指出，CEO 们的言论调整反映了科技公司在商业化压力下的策略转变。
items.summary_en: OpenAI, Anthropic CEOs walk back AI job warnings as IPOs loom HR Executive
items.why_zh: 这反映了 AI 公司在商业化过程中如何调整叙事以吸引投资。
items.why_en: This highlights how AI companies adjust their narrative to attract investment during commercialization.

items.title_zh: 临床试验中AI与人机交互趋势的混合人机探索
items.title_en: Trends in AI and Human-AI Interaction in Clinical Trials -- A Hybrid Human-AI Exploration
items.summary_zh: 该论文利用ClinicalTrials.gov注册库的数据，分析了AI术语的时间趋势和AI试验的地理分布。研究采用混合人机方法，结合前沿生成式AI模型（GPT-5.5）和人工审查，筛选并分类AI相关试验记录。结果显示，AI相关试验数量随时间显著增加，且近年来增长尤为明显。该工作为理解AI在临床试验中的应用演变提供了新视角，并展示了人机协作在文献分析中的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29096v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper examines records retrieved from the ClinicalTrials.gov registry to characterize temporal trends in AI terminology and the geographical distribution of AI trials. The work also reports on an exploratory hybrid human-AI approach to analyzing human-AI interaction trends in registered clinical trials. The hybrid workflow comprised a frontier generative AI model (GPT-5.5) and human review to screen and categorize records returned by an AI-focused search. The findings indicate a marked increase in AI-related trials over time, with recent gro…
items.why_zh: 揭示了AI在临床试验领域应用的快速增长趋势，为医疗AI发展提供重要参考。
items.why_en: Reveals the rapid growth of AI applications in clinical trials, providing key insights for medical AI development.

items.title_zh: 面向屏幕条件动作预测的架构敏感监督微调：PiSAR基准
items.title_en: Architecture-Sensitive Supervised Fine-Tuning for Screen-Conditioned Action Prediction: A PiSAR Benchmark
items.summary_zh: 该研究在PiSAR数据集（包含12,929个屏幕锚定行为理由元组）的661行保留子集上，对三个监督微调模型与前沿零样本基线进行了基准测试。所有模型使用相同评分流程评估。主要发现：前沿零样本基线（Claude Opus 4.7和GPT-5.5）达到语义相似度0.459，而微调模型表现各异。研究揭示了不同模型架构对屏幕条件动作预测任务的影响，为相关领域模型选择提供了参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We benchmark three supervised fine-tuned models against frontier zero-shot baselines on a 661-row held-out slice of PiSAR (Persona, intent, Screen, Action, Rationale), a 12,929-tuple corpus of screen-anchored behavioural rationales curated from public app-store reviews, Pew American Trends Panel demographics, and the OPeRA shopper traces. Every model, frontier or fine-tuned, is evaluated on the same 661-row slice with the same scoring pipeline. Two findings. First, frontier zero-shot baselines (Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5) reach sem_sim 0.459 and…
items.why_zh: 为屏幕条件动作预测任务提供了系统性的模型比较基准，有助于指导实际应用中的模型选择。
items.why_en: Provides a systematic benchmark for screen-conditioned action prediction, guiding model selection in practical applications.

items.title_zh: 面向跨建筑能耗预测的不确定性感知迁移学习
items.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Transfer Learning for Cross-Building Energy Forecasting: Toward Robust and Scalable District-Level Energy Management
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种基于时间融合变换器（TFT）的不确定性感知迁移学习框架，用于跨建筑能耗预测。框架在丹麦奥尔堡大学教育建筑（源域）和瑞士EMPA多类型NEST建筑（目标域）的高分辨率真实子计量数据集上评估。通过引入迁移学习，模型仅需少量目标域数据即可实现跨建筑复用，并提供诚实的不确定性估计。该工作为可扩展的区域级能源管理提供了新方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29733v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scaling data-driven energy forecasting to district level requires models that can be re-used across buildings with minimal target-domain data and honest uncertainty estimates. We present an uncertainty-aware transfer learning (TL) framework for cross-building energy forecasting based on the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT), evaluated on a newly released high-resolution real sub-meter dataset: an educational building at Aalborg University, Denmark (source) and the multi-typology NEST building at EMPA, Switzerland (target). We introduce the Transf…
items.why_zh: 解决了跨建筑能耗预测中数据稀缺和不确定性量化难题，推动区域级能源管理规模化。
items.why_en: Addresses data scarcity and uncertainty quantification in cross-building energy forecasting, enabling scalable district-level energy management.

items.title_zh: 开源安全防护模型的全面基准评估
items.title_en: Benchmarking Open-Source Safety Guard Models: A Comprehensive Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 该研究对14个开源安全防护模型进行了全面评估，使用包含79,331个样本的基准数据集，覆盖NIST AI风险框架的8个安全类别。数据集整合了HarmBench、StrongREJECT、RealToxicityPrompts和BeaverTails四个数据集，并过滤聚焦于暴力、仇恨言论、骚扰、色情内容、自杀/自残、脏话等安全相关内容。评估为LLM安全部署中的内容审核模型选择提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28830v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, robust content moderation becomes essential. We present a comprehensive evaluation of 14 open-source safety guard models on a curated benchmark of 79,331 samples spanning 8 NIST AI Risk Framework safety categories. Our benchmark aggregates four diverse datasets (HarmBench, StrongREJECT, RealToxicityPrompts, and BeaverTails), filtered to focus exclusively on safety-relevant content (violence, hate speech, harassment, sexual content, suicide/self-harm, prof…
items.why_zh: 为LLM安全部署提供了开源防护模型的系统性性能比较，有助于提升AI系统安全性。
items.why_en: Provides systematic performance comparison of open-source safety models for LLM deployment, enhancing AI system safety.

items.title_zh: 儿童语音转录：ASR性能与可靠正字法转录的获取
items.title_en: Transcribing Children's Speech: ASR Performance and Obtaining Reliable Orthographic Transcriptions
items.summary_zh: 该研究评估了九个来自三个模型家族的先进ASR模型在儿童语音上的表现，通过两个研究问题探讨其有效性。儿童语音ASR面临低资源语言中儿童专用预训练模型有限和噪声条件多样化的挑战。研究旨在评估ASR在减少儿童语音研究人工标注工作量方面的潜力，并探索获取可靠正字法转录的方法。结果将为儿童语音处理领域提供重要指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28833v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has the potential to substantially reduce manual annotation effort in child speech research by generating automatic transcriptions. However, obtaining reliably high-quality ASR transcriptions for child speech remains challenging in low-resource languages due to limited child-specific pre-trained models and highly diverse noise conditions. This study investigates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art ASR models on child speech through two research questions, by evaluating nine ASR models from three model famili…
items.why_zh: 为儿童语音ASR应用提供了系统评估，有助于推动儿童语言发展研究的自动化。
items.why_en: Provides systematic evaluation of ASR for child speech, advancing automation in child language development research.

items.title_zh: 智能体AI在爱因斯坦望远镜模拟数据分析中的首次头对头比较
items.title_en: First head-to-head comparison of agentic AI applied to the analysis of simulated data of the Einstein Telescope
items.summary_zh: 该研究对两个最先进的智能体AI系统——Anthropic的Claude Code和OpenAI的Codex进行了头对头比较，任务是在共享计算基础设施上自主执行端到端引力波数据分析流程，无需人工干预。流程包括从爱因斯坦望远镜模拟噪声中估计功率谱密度、生成几何模板库、匹配滤波恢复100个双黑洞信号注入、自动生成结果以及大语言模型辅助产品生成。这是首次对智能体AI在引力波数据分析中的应用进行直接比较。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28916v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We report a comparison of two state-of-the-art agentic AI systems, Claude Code (Anthropic) and Codex (OpenAI), tasked with autonomously executing a simple end-to-end gravitational wave data analysis pipeline on a shared computing infrastructure without human intervention. The pipeline comprises power spectral density estimation from raw Einstein Telescope simulated noise, geometric template bank generation, matched filter recovery of 100 binary black hole signal injections, automated results generation, and large language model-assisted product…
items.why_zh: 首次直接比较智能体AI在引力波数据分析中的表现，为科学自动化探索新路径。
items.why_en: First direct comparison of agentic AI in gravitational wave data analysis, exploring new paths for scientific automation.

items.title_zh: 科学机器学习中的多区域模式：不同失败模式与区域特定优化
items.title_en: Unveiling Multi-regime Patterns in SciML: Distinct Failure Modes and Regime-specific Optimization
items.summary_zh: 该论文通过区域感知诊断框架，联合分析性能、训练动态和损失景观几何，研究了科学机器学习（SciML）模型中的多区域行为。主要发现：（i）许多标准SciML模型、不同约束条件下出现一致的三区域结构；（ii）不同区域对应不同的失败模式；（iii）区域特定优化策略可提升性能。该工作揭示了超参数设置如何导致训练进入不同行为区域，为SciML模型调优提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29153v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Neural networks trained under different hyperparameter settings can fall into distinct training "regimes," with consistent behavior within regimes and qualitative differences across regimes. In this paper, we study such multi-regime behavior in scientific machine learning (SciML) models through a regime-aware diagnostic framework that jointly analyzes performance, training dynamics, and loss-landscape geometry. We identify three key findings: (i) a consistent three-regime structure emerges across many standard SciML models, different constraint…
items.why_zh: 揭示了SciML模型训练中的多区域行为，为理解模型失败模式和优化策略提供了新见解。
items.why_en: Reveals multi-regime behavior in SciML training, offering new insights into failure modes and optimization strategies.

items.title_zh: 迈向伦理的面部年龄估计：不基于儿童数据训练的广义零样本基准
items.title_en: Toward Ethical Facial Age Estimation: A Generalized Zero-Shot Benchmark Without Training on Children's Data
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种面部年龄估计的广义零样本基准，明确在训练中排除儿童数据，同时仍评估模型在年轻人群上的表现。研究重新审视了六个广泛使用的数据集，引入严格的年龄组分离划分：18-59岁样本用于训练、验证和测试；18岁以下样本仅用于测试。该方法解决了使用儿童图像训练年龄估计模型引发的伦理、法律和隐私问题，为更道德的年龄估计研究提供了框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29230v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Age estimation from facial images typically relies on training data that includes images of minors, a practice that raises serious ethical, legal, and privacy concerns. In this work, we propose a generalized zero-shot benchmark for facial age estimation that explicitly excludes children's data during training while still assessing model performance on younger populations. We revisit six widely used datasets and introduce standardized splits with strict age-group separation: samples aged 18-59 for training, validation, and testing; samples under…
items.why_zh: 提出了不依赖儿童数据的面部年龄估计方法，解决了该领域的伦理和隐私难题。
items.why_en: Proposes an ethical facial age estimation approach without using children's data, addressing key ethical and privacy concerns.

items.title_zh: 进化搜索中的计算分配：从深度-广度到多臂老虎机
items.title_en: Compute Allocation in Evolutionary Search: From Depth-Breadth to Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文研究了在LLM引导的进化搜索（Evolve系统）中，如何分配固定的LLM调用预算。现有系统通常只报告多次运行中的最佳结果，而忽略了运行间的分布。作者通过五个模型和三个任务的深度-广度网格扫描，发现了两个经验规律：一个适应度-计算包络线，其中能力排序主要取决于效果；以及一个多臂老虎机框架，用于动态分配计算资源。这些发现有助于提高进化搜索的可靠性和效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29268v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary search (Evolve systems) has reached state-of-the-art results on mathematical and combinatorial tasks, yet most existing systems report only the best of many runs and leave the run-to-run distribution undocumented. We ask how a fixed budget of LLM calls should be allocated, and how reliably a single run reaches the reported numbers. Sweeping the depth-breadth grid over five models and three tasks, we identify two empirical regularities: a fitness-compute envelope along which capability ordering largely collapses on effect…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了进化搜索中计算分配的关键规律，有助于提升LLM引导系统的可靠性和效率。
items.why_en: This study reveals key regularities in compute allocation for evolutionary search, improving reliability and efficiency of LLM-guided systems.

items.title_zh: LoopFM：从基础模型的历史表示中学习推荐
items.title_en: LoopFM: Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of Foundation Model for Recommendation
items.summary_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）将大型基础模型（FM）的单个标量预测转移到紧凑的垂直模型（VM），但存在传递率递减的问题。为了解决这一瓶颈，本文提出了LoopFM框架，通过将FM的中间嵌入结构化为输入特征（如用户历史），开辟了一个高带宽的传输通道。实验表明，LoopFM显著提高了知识传递效率，使VM能够捕获更多FM的改进。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29280v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers a single scalar prediction from a large foundation model (FM) to compact vertical models (VMs), suffering from diminishing transfer ratio -- the fraction of FM improvement captured by the VM -- as a single scalar cannot convey the rich intermediate knowledge that larger FMs learn. To address this bottleneck, we propose LoopFM (Learning frOm HistOrical ReP*resentations of FM), a framework that opens a high-bandwidth transfer channel by structuring FM intermediate embeddings as input features (e.g., user hist…
items.why_zh: LoopFM通过利用中间表示，大幅提升了知识蒸馏的效率，有助于在资源受限场景中部署强大的推荐模型。
items.why_en: LoopFM significantly improves knowledge distillation efficiency by leveraging intermediate representations, enabling deployment of powerful recommendation models in resource-constrained settings.

items.title_zh: 从企业违约预测模型中进化规则提取
items.title_en: Evolutionary Rule Extraction from Corporate Default Prediction Models
items.summary_zh: 中小企业（SME）在大多数经济体中占企业多数，但面临财务约束和更高的财务困境风险。预测SME违约对金融机构和政策制定者至关重要。尽管机器学习提高了信用风险建模的预测性能，但复杂模型的可解释性不足引发透明度和合规性担忧。本研究调查了SME违约预测因子，并采用进化算法从黑盒模型中提取可解释的规则，以平衡准确性和可解释性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29478v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) represent the majority of firms in most economies and often face financial constraints and higher vulnerability to financial distress. Predicting SME default is therefore crucial for financial institutions, policymakers, and researchers. Recent advances in machine learning (ML) have improved predictive performance in credit risk modeling. Yet, the limited interpretability of complex models raises concerns regarding transparency and regulatory compliance. This study investigates SME's default predictors…
items.why_zh: 该研究为信用风险建模提供了可解释的规则提取方法，有助于满足监管合规要求并增强模型透明度。
items.why_en: This work provides interpretable rule extraction for credit risk modeling, aiding regulatory compliance and model transparency.

items.title_zh: GPIC：用于视觉生成的巨型许可图像语料库
items.title_en: GPIC: A Giant Permissive Image Corpus for Visual Generation
items.summary_zh: 研究视觉生成的可扩展方法需要大型、可访问且稳定的数据集。本文介绍了GPIC，一个包含约28万亿像素的巨型许可图像语料库。GPIC包含由最先进的视觉语言模型标注的多样化互联网图像，包括1亿训练样本、20万验证样本和100万测试样本。所有图像均获得研究及商业用途的许可，经过安全过滤、去重，并托管在Hugging Face上。同时提供了基准测试协议。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30341v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Studying scalable methods for visual generative modeling requires large, accessible, and stable datasets. We introduce GPIC, a Giant Permissive Image Corpus of approximately 28 trillion pixels. GPIC comprises diverse internet images captioned by a state-of-the-art vision-language model, including 100M training, 200K validation, and 1M test examples. Moreover, all GPIC images are permissively licensed for both research and commercial use. GPIC is safety-filtered, deduplicated, and centrally hosted on Hugging Face. We provide a benchmarking proto…
items.why_zh: GPIC为视觉生成研究提供了大规模、高质量且合法可用的数据集，有望推动该领域的快速发展。
items.why_en: GPIC provides a large-scale, high-quality, and legally usable dataset for visual generation, potentially accelerating progress in the field.

items.title_zh: 超越准确性：时间序列基础模型是否校准良好？
items.title_en: Beyond Accuracy: Are Time Series Foundation Models Well-Calibrated?
items.summary_zh: 时间序列基础模型在预测性能上取得了最先进的结果，但其校准特性（即预测置信度与实际正确率的一致性）尚未得到充分研究。本文调查了五个近期时间序列基础模型和两个竞争基线的校准相关属性。通过一系列实验，作者发现这些模型在校准方面存在显著差异，有些模型存在过度自信或信心不足的问题，这在实际应用中可能影响决策可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.16060v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The recent development of foundation models for time series data has generated considerable interest in using such models across a variety of applications. Although foundation models achieve state-of-the-art predictive performance, their calibration properties remain relatively underexplored, despite the fact that calibration can be critical for many practical applications. In this paper, we investigate the calibration-related properties of five recent time series foundation models and two competitive baselines. We perform a series of s…
items.why_zh: 校准是时间序列预测在实际应用中的关键因素，该研究揭示了现有基础模型在校准方面的不足，为改进模型可靠性提供了方向。
items.why_en: Calibration is critical for practical time series forecasting; this study reveals deficiencies in current foundation models, guiding improvements in reliability.

items.title_zh: 当2D任务遇到1D序列化：结构化任务中的序列化摩擦
items.title_en: When 2D Tasks Meet 1D Serialization: On Serialization Friction in Structured Tasks
items.summary_zh: 在LLM时代，许多符号化和结构化问题通过1D文本序列化呈现给模型。然而，有些问题本质上是二维的，其相关关系（如行列对应或空间邻接）由2D布局中的位置定义，而非顺序。本文通过序列化摩擦的概念研究了这一问题：将相同的符号条目保留在1D序列中是否也能保留计算所需的关系结构？实验表明，序列化会导致信息丢失，影响模型在结构化任务上的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.27272v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In the LLM era, many symbolic and structured problems are presented to models through 1D text serialization. Yet some such problems are natively two-dimensional: their relevant relations, such as row--column correspondence or spatial adjacency, are defined by position in a 2D layout rather than by sequential order. This raises a representational question: does preserving the same symbolic entries in a 1D sequence also preserve the relational structure needed for computation? We study this issue through the lens of serialization friction…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM在处理结构化任务时的固有局限性，对改进模型架构和输入表示具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work reveals inherent limitations of LLMs in handling structured tasks, important for improving model architecture and input representation.

items.title_zh: MedMosaic：多样化医学音频的大规模挑战性基准
items.title_en: MedMosaic: A Challenging Large Scale Benchmark of Diverse Medical Audio
items.summary_zh: 医学音频数据由于隐私法规和高昂的标注成本而难以收集，现有基准往往无法覆盖复杂的医学音频场景。本文提出了MedMosaic，一个医学音频问答数据集，用于在现实临床约束下基准测试语言和音频推理模型。MedMosaic包含多种医学音频类型，包括与疾病相关的生理声音、精心构建的合成语音等，旨在推动医学音频分析的发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.00969v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Medical audio data is difficult to collect due to privacy regulations and high annotation costs arising from domain expertise. Thus, existing benchmarks tend to underrepresent complex medical audio scenarios. To address this challenge, we present MedMosaic, a medical audio question-answering dataset designed to benchmark language and audio reasoning models under realistic clinical constraints. MedMosaic features a diverse range of medical audio types, including condition-related physiological sounds, carefully constructed synthetic voic…
items.why_zh: MedMosaic填补了医学音频基准的空白，为开发更强大的医学音频分析模型提供了重要资源。
items.why_en: MedMosaic fills a gap in medical audio benchmarks, providing a key resource for developing more capable medical audio analysis models.

items.title_zh: AI天气模型能否预测两周以上？长期滚动的定量基准与分析
items.title_en: Can AI Weather Models Predict Beyond Two Weeks? A Quantitative Benchmark and Analysis of Long Rollouts
items.summary_zh: AI天气模型在短期到中期预报（最多15天）中表现出色，但在更长时间跨度上经常出现不稳定性。本文通过九个最先进AI天气模型的全年滚动预报，将失败模式分类为三种：爆炸、漂移和季节性丧失。分析表明，稳定性取决于对小时空尺度的处理：不稳定模型会放大高频能量，而稳定模型则能保持能量平衡。该研究为开发更稳定的长期天气预报模型提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30184v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While AI weather models excel at short-to-medium range forecasts (up to 15 days), they frequently suffer from ill-defined "instabilities" when rolled out over longer horizons. This work addresses the lack of a formal taxonomy by categorizing these failures into three distinct regimes: blow-up, drift, and loss of seasonality, through year-long rollouts of nine state-of-the-art AI weather models. Our analysis reveals that stability hinges on the treatment of small spatio-temporal scales: unstable models amplify high-frequency energy, while stable m…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统分析了AI天气模型长期预报的不稳定性，为改进模型设计、实现更可靠的长期天气预报奠定了基础。
items.why_en: This work systematically analyzes instabilities in long-term AI weather forecasts, laying the foundation for more reliable extended-range predictions.

items.title_zh: RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo：通过词汇注入和边缘优先部署的开源亚10亿参数阿拉伯语模型
items.title_en: RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo: An Open Sub-1B Arabic Language Model via Vocabulary Injection and Edge-First Deployment
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2605.28827v1 发布了一篇关于阿拉伯语大语言模型的论文。当前开源阿拉伯语模型分为两类：亚10亿参数的多语言模型（如Qwen2.5-0.5B、Falcon-H1-0.5B）将阿拉伯语视为次要语言，而70亿至700亿参数的阿拉伯语专用模型（如Jais、AceGPT、ALLaM、SILMA）则需要服务器才能运行。此前唯一尝试的亚20亿参数阿拉伯语专用模型Kuwain-1.5B从未公开权重。本文提出了RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo，一个基于Qwen2.5-0.5B构建的5.18亿参数阿拉伯语专用解码器LLM。其流程通过均值子词初始化添加了27,032个阿拉伯语词元，并进行了持续预训练。该模型专为边缘设备部署设计，在阿拉伯语任务上表现优异，填补了轻量级阿拉伯语模型的空白。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28827v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Open Arabic large language models split into two classes: sub-1B multilingual models that treat Arabic as an afterthought (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Falcon-H1-0.5B), and 7B-70B Arabic-specialized models that require a server to run (Jais, AceGPT, ALLaM, SILMA). The one published attempt at a sub-2B Arabic-specialized model, Kuwain-1.5B, never released its weights. We present RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo, a 518M-parameter Arabic-specialized decoder LLM built on Qwen2.5-0.5B. The pipeline adds 27,032 Arabic tokens via mean-subtoken initialization, continues pr…
items.why_zh: 该模型首次开源了亚10亿参数的阿拉伯语专用大语言模型，为资源受限场景下的阿拉伯语AI应用提供了可行方案。
items.why_en: This model is the first open-source sub-1B Arabic-specialized LLM, enabling Arabic AI applications in resource-constrained environments.

items.title_zh: 异构带宽预算下联邦探针-对数蒸馏的匹配率与最优分配
items.title_en: Matching Rates and Optimal Allocation for Federated Probe-Logit Distillation under Heterogeneous Bandwidth Budgets
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2605.29642v1 研究了联邦语言建模中的通信效率问题。在联邦探针-对数蒸馏（FPLD）中，K个节点各自持有n个样本，但无法共享数据或交换全精度梯度/权重。每个节点在公共探针集上每次查询最多上传B比特，并传输标量量化的对数向量，聚合器则蒸馏出一个全局参数化学生模型。先前工作（Dubey and Huo, 2026）建立了高概率KL散度率。本文进一步推导了匹配率，并提出了在异构带宽预算下的最优分配策略，以最小化估计误差。该工作对联邦学习中的通信-精度权衡具有重要理论意义。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29642v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In federated language modeling, $K$ nodes each hold $n$ samples but cannot pool data or exchange full-precision gradients or weights. We study the minimax rate at which a conditional distribution over $V$ tokens can be estimated when each node may upload at most $B$ bits per query in a public probe set. In federated probe-logit distillation (FPLD), each node transmits a scalar-quantized logit vector on the probe set, and an aggregator distills a global parametric student. Prior work (Dubey and Huo, 2026) establishes a high-probability KL rate $…
items.why_zh: 该研究为异构带宽下联邦学习的通信-精度权衡提供了理论最优解，对实际部署具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This work provides theoretical optimal solutions for communication-accuracy trade-offs in federated learning under heterogeneous bandwidth, guiding practical deployment.

items.title_zh: 基于手势感知的室内太赫兹ISAC系统自适应资源分配
items.title_en: Gesture-Aware Indoor THz ISAC Systems for Adaptive Resource Allocation
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2605.29913v1 提出了一种基于手势识别的多用户室内太赫兹（THz）集成感知与通信（ISAC）系统。该系统利用扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）进行手势跟踪，接入点（AP）根据检测到的手势变化动态调整资源分配，从而提高感知精度。基于手势识别结果，AP进一步更新不同用户的通信质量需求，实现高效的自适应资源分配。该研究将手势识别与THz ISAC相结合，为智能室内环境中的通信与感知协同提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29913v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper investigates a multi-user indoor integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) system operating in the terahertz (THz) band, designed for adaptive communication based on gesture recognition. Leveraging gesture tracking through an extended Kalman filter (EKF), the access point (AP) dynamically adjusts resource allocation in response to detected gesture variations, thereby improving sensing accuracy. Based on the gesture recognition results, the AP further updates the communication quality requirements of different users, enabling effici…
items.why_zh: 该工作首次将手势识别融入太赫兹ISAC系统，为智能室内场景中的通信与感知协同提供了创新方案。
items.why_en: This work is the first to integrate gesture recognition into THz ISAC systems, offering an innovative solution for communication-sensing coordination in smart indoor environments.

items.title_zh: 大语言模型的潜在性能剖析
items.title_en: Latent Performance Profiling of Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2605.30018v1 指出，大语言模型（LLM）在标准化基准上常取得高分，但仅凭准确率无法全面反映其能力。当前通过排行榜评估开源LLM存在数据污染、任务范围狭窄、与真实可靠性脱节等问题。基准评估（如MMLU PRO、BBH、IFEval）主要捕捉模型在固定测试集上的输出，而非其信息处理、不确定性校准或内部知识结构。本文提出了一种潜在性能剖析方法，旨在更深入地理解LLM的内部工作机制和实际能力，超越传统基准的局限。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30018v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently achieve impressive scores on standardized benchmarks, yet accuracy alone offers a limited view of their capabilities. Evaluating open-source LLMs through leaderboards faces persistent issues like data contamination, narrow task scope, and weak alignment with real-world reliability. Benchmark-based evaluations such as MMLU PRO, BBH, or IFEval primarily capture \textit{what} a model outputs on fixed test sets, not \textit{how} it processes information, calibrates uncertainty, or structures internal knowledg…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了当前LLM评估方法的局限性，并提出了更全面的性能剖析框架，对模型理解和改进具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work reveals limitations of current LLM evaluation and proposes a more comprehensive profiling framework, crucial for model understanding and improvement.

items.title_zh: 神经逻辑Bandits
items.title_en: Neural Logistic Bandits
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2505.02069v2 研究了神经逻辑Bandits问题，即使用神经网络在逻辑链接函数内学习未知奖励函数。现有方法要么对κ（1/κ表示奖励分布的最小方差）有不利依赖，要么直接依赖于特征维度d（在神经网络设置中可能很大）。本文引入了一种新的自归一化向量值鞅的Bernstein型不等式，专门设计用于解决这些依赖问题。该工作为神经网络在Bandit场景中的应用提供了更高效的理论保证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2505.02069v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study the problem of neural logistic bandits, where the main task is to learn an unknown reward function within a logistic link function using a neural network. Existing approaches either exhibit unfavorable dependencies on $\kappa$, where $1/\kappa$ represents the minimum variance of reward distributions, or suffer from direct dependence on the feature dimension $d$, which can be huge in neural network-based settings. In this work, we introduce a novel Bernstein-type inequality for self-normalized vector-valued martingales that is designe…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了神经逻辑Bandits中关键的理论依赖问题，为神经网络在在线学习中的应用提供了更优的理论基础。
items.why_en: This work addresses key theoretical dependencies in neural logistic bandits, providing a better foundation for neural network applications in online learning.

items.title_zh: 时间序列预测中神经网络的地平线激活映射
items.title_en: Horizon Activation Mapping for Neural Networks in Time Series Forecasting
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2601.02094v4 提出了一种名为地平线激活映射（HAM）的可视化可解释性技术，用于时间序列预测中的神经网络。受grad-CAM启发，HAM利用梯度范数平均值研究地平线的子序列，而grad-CAM则研究图像数据上的注意力图。该方法与模型架构无关，适用于不同家族的最先进模型。此外，论文引入了因果解释指标，帮助理解模型在时间序列预测中的决策过程。HAM为时间序列模型的可解释性提供了新工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.02094v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Neural networks for time series forecasting have relied on error metrics and architecture-specific interpretability approaches for model selection that don't apply across models of different families. To interpret forecasting models agnostic to the types of layers across state-of-the-art model families, we introduce Horizon Activation Mapping (HAM), a visual interpretability technique inspired by grad-CAM that uses gradient norm averages to study the horizon's subseries where grad-CAM studies attention maps over image data. We introduce causa…
items.why_zh: HAM为时间序列预测模型提供了首个与架构无关的可视化解释方法，有助于理解模型决策过程。
items.why_en: HAM provides the first architecture-agnostic visual interpretability method for time series forecasting models, aiding understanding of model decisions.

items.title_zh: HE-SNR：通过熵揭示潜在逻辑以指导SWE-bench上的中期训练
items.title_en: HE-SNR: Uncovering Latent Logic via Entropy for Guiding Mid-Training on SWE-bench
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2601.20255v3 针对SWE-bench基准，提出了一种名为HE-SNR的指标，用于指导大语言模型的中期训练。SWE-bench是评估LLM在复杂软件工程任务上的主要基准。标准指标如困惑度（PPL）受到“长上下文税”的影响，且与下游SWE性能相关性弱。本文首先通过信息论分析揭示了PPL的不足，然后提出了基于熵的HE-SNR指标，该指标能更好地反映模型在软件工程任务中的潜在逻辑能力。实验表明，HE-SNR能有效指导中期训练，提升模型在SWE-bench上的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.20255v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: SWE-bench has emerged as the premier benchmark for evaluating Large Language Models on complex software engineering tasks. While these capabilities are fundamentally acquired during the mid-training phase and subsequently elicited during Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), there remains a critical deficit in metrics capable of guiding mid-training effectively. Standard metrics such as Perplexity (PPL) are compromised by the "Long-Context Tax" and exhibit weak correlation with downstream SWE performance. In this paper, we bridge this gap by first in…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了一个更有效的指标来指导LLM在软件工程任务上的中期训练，有望提升模型的实际编码能力。
items.why_en: This work proposes a more effective metric for guiding mid-training of LLMs on software engineering tasks, potentially improving real-world coding capabilities.

items.title_zh: 表示遗忘：通过信息压缩实现遗忘
items.title_en: Representation Unlearning: Forgetting through Information Compression
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2601.21564v2 提出了一种名为“表示遗忘”的机器遗忘框架。机器遗忘旨在移除模型对特定训练数据的影响，现有方法通常修改模型参数，但可能不稳定、计算成本高且受局部近似限制。表示遗忘直接在模型的表示空间中进行遗忘，通过学习一个施加信息瓶颈的变换来压缩表示，从而移除特定数据的信息。该方法无需修改模型参数，更加高效和稳定。实验表明，表示遗忘在遗忘效果和模型性能保持方面均具有竞争力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.21564v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Machine unlearning seeks to remove the influence of specific training data from a model, a need driven by privacy regulations and robustness concerns. Existing approaches typically modify model parameters, but such updates can be unstable, computationally costly, and limited by local approximations. We introduce Representation Unlearning, a framework that performs unlearning directly in the model's representation space. Instead of modifying model parameters, we learn a transformation over representations that imposes an information bottleneck…
items.why_zh: 该工作提供了一种无需修改模型参数的机器遗忘方法，更加高效稳定，对隐私保护和模型鲁棒性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work offers a parameter-free machine unlearning method that is more efficient and stable, with significant implications for privacy and robustness.

items.title_zh: 时间序列预训练中归纳偏置的作用：临床时间序列通用表征学习案例研究
items.title_en: On the Role of Inductive Bias in Time-Series Pretraining: A Case Study in Learning Generalizable Representations for Clinical Time Series
items.summary_zh: 临床时间序列学习常受限于小规模、异质性强的队列和协议漂移，其下游任务涵盖分类（如病理诊断）和回归（如时间预测）。这些限制使得基础模型预训练具有吸引力，但关键问题在于预训练目标应施加何种归纳偏置，以使表征能够跨任务类型和受试者迁移。本研究通过脊髓损伤（SCI）的病理步态分析来探讨这一问题，使用Path...数据集。研究旨在发现有效的预训练策略，提升模型在临床时间序列上的泛化能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.26194v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Clinical time-series learning is routinely constrained by small, heterogeneous cohorts and protocol drift, while its downstream use spans both classification (e.g., pathology diagnosis) and regression (e.g., temporal forecasting). These constraints make foundation-model pretraining appealing, but raises an important question of which inductive biases should the pretraining objective impose so that representations transfer across task types and subjects. We study this question in pathological gait analysis for spinal cord injury (SCI) via Path…
items.why_zh: 该研究为临床时间序列预训练的设计原则提供了关键见解，有助于开发更通用的医疗AI模型。
items.why_en: This study provides key insights into designing pretraining objectives for clinical time series, enabling more generalizable medical AI models.

items.title_zh: 扩散可微重采样
items.title_en: Diffusion differentiable resampling
items.summary_zh: 本文关注序贯蒙特卡洛（如粒子滤波）中的可微重采样问题。基于重参数化，提出了一种新的重采样方法，该方法信息量大且可即时微分，基于无需训练的扩散模型代理。理论上证明了该扩散重采样方法提供一致的重采样分布，实验表明在多个滤波和参数估计任务上优于现有最先进的可微重采样方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.10401v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper is concerned with differentiable resampling in the context of sequential Monte Carlo (e.g., particle filtering). Drawing on reparametrisation, we propose a new resampling method that is informative and instantly differentiable, based on a training-free diffusion model surrogate. We theoretically prove that our diffusion resampling method provides a consistent resampling distribution, and we show empirically that it outperforms the state-of-the-art differentiable resampling methods on multiple filtering and parameter estimatio…
items.why_zh: 该方法解决了粒子滤波中可微重采样的关键难题，提升了深度学习与贝叶斯推理的融合效率。
items.why_en: This method addresses a key challenge in differentiable resampling for particle filtering, improving the integration of deep learning and Bayesian inference.

items.title_zh: 程序化预训练：用抽象数据预热语言模型
items.title_en: Procedural Pretraining: Warming Up Language Models with Abstract Data
items.summary_zh: 直接在网络规模语料上预训练语言模型是当前主流范式。本研究探索一种替代方案：先让模型接触抽象结构化数据，以缓解后续获取丰富语义知识的难度，类似于人类先学习简单逻辑和数学再进行高级推理。研究聚焦于由形式语言和其他简单算法生成的程序化数据作为抽象数据。首先诊断了不同形式的程序化数据能显著提升的算法技能，并发现...（后续细节未提供）。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.21725v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Pretraining language models directly on web-scale corpora is the de facto paradigm. We study an alternative where the model is initially exposed to abstract structured data to ease the subsequent acquisition of rich semantic knowledge, much like humans learning simple logic and mathematics before higher reasoning. We focus on procedural data, generated by formal languages and other simple algorithms, as such abstract data. We first diagnose the algorithmic skills that different forms of procedural data can improve, often significantly.…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了当前预训练范式，提出通过抽象数据预热可能提升语言模型的推理能力。
items.why_en: This work challenges the current pretraining paradigm by proposing that warming up with abstract data could enhance language models' reasoning abilities.

items.title_zh: LUMINA：采用能量协调协议的多供应商乳腺X线摄影基准
items.title_en: LUMINA: A Multi-Vendor Mammography Benchmark with Energy Harmonization Protocol
items.summary_zh: 公开的全视野数字乳腺X线摄影（FFDM）数据集在规模、临床标注和供应商多样性方面仍然有限，阻碍了稳健模型的开发。本文介绍LUMINA，一个精心策划的多供应商FFDM数据集，明确编码了采集能量和供应商元数据，以捕捉现有基准中常被忽略的临床相关外观变化。该数据集包含来自468名患者的1824张图像（960张良性，864张恶性），附有病理确认标签、BI-RADS评估和乳腺密度信息。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.14644v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Publicly available full-field digital mammography (FFDM) datasets remain limited in size, clinical annotations, and vendor diversity, hindering the development of robust models. We introduce LUMINA, a curated, multi-vendor FFDM dataset that explicitly encodes acquisition energy and vendor metadata to capture clinically relevant appearance variations often overlooked in existing benchmarks. This dataset contains 1824 images from 468 patients (960 benign, 864 malignant), with pathology-confirmed labels, BI-RADS assessments, and breast-den…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了多供应商乳腺X线摄影基准的空白，有助于开发更鲁棒、泛化能力更强的乳腺癌诊断模型。
items.why_en: This dataset fills a gap in multi-vendor mammography benchmarks, enabling more robust and generalizable breast cancer diagnosis models.

items.title_zh: 联合国在瓦伦西亚启动人工智能治理造福人类实验室
items.title_en: Press Release | UN launches AI Governance for Humanity Lab in Valencia
items.summary_zh: 联合国宣布在西班牙瓦伦西亚启动“人工智能治理造福人类实验室”。该实验室旨在推动全球AI治理，确保AI技术发展造福全人类。具体细节尚未公布，但此举标志着联合国在AI治理领域迈出重要一步。
items.summary_en: Press Release | UN launches AI Governance for Humanity Lab in Valencia Welcome to the United Nations
items.why_zh: 联合国设立AI治理实验室，体现了国际社会对AI伦理与治理的高度重视，可能影响全球AI政策走向。
items.why_en: The UN's AI governance lab signals a major step in international AI policy, potentially shaping global AI regulations.

items.title_zh: Anthropic融资650亿美元，估值逼近万亿美元，IPO在即
items.title_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
items.summary_zh: 据TechCrunch报道，AI公司Anthropic完成650亿美元融资，估值接近1万亿美元，并计划进行IPO。这一巨额融资凸显了市场对AI领域的高度关注和信心。Anthropic是Claude系列模型的开发商，此次融资将加速其技术研发和商业化进程。
items.summary_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO TechCrunch
items.why_zh: Anthropic的巨额融资和接近万亿美元的估值，反映了AI行业的资本热潮和竞争加剧。
items.why_en: Anthropic's massive funding and near-trillion-dollar valuation highlight the AI investment boom and intensifying competition.

items.title_zh: Anthropic即将推出Claude Mythos，并发布Opus 4.8
items.title_en: Anthropic to roll out Claude Mythos in coming weeks, launches Opus 4.8
items.summary_zh: 据路透社报道，Anthropic计划在未来几周内推出名为Claude Mythos的新模型，同时发布了Opus 4.8版本。这表明Anthropic正在加速其模型迭代，以保持竞争力。具体细节尚未披露，但预计新模型将在性能或功能上有所提升。
items.summary_en: Anthropic to roll out Claude Mythos in coming weeks, launches Opus 4.8 Reuters
items.why_zh: Anthropic快速推出新模型，显示AI大模型竞争白热化，产品迭代速度成为关键。
items.why_en: Anthropic's rapid model releases underscore the intense competition in AI, where iteration speed is critical.

items.title_zh: 一部耗资2000美元的AI生成电影将在翠贝卡电影节首映
items.title_en: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
items.summary_zh: 下个月的翠贝卡电影节将首映一部AI生成的电影《紫罗兰之梦》。这部75分钟的电影虚构了伊朗政府2022年1月大规模杀害抗议者的事件，人物和场景完全由AI生成。电影制作成本仅2000美元，基于新闻报道、照片和目击者证词。由Ash和Pooya Koosha兄弟创作，Pooya是Fountain 0公司的联合创始人。
items.summary_en: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets . The 75-minute film is a fictional dramatization of the Iranian government's mass killing of protestors in January, with the people and images fully created by AI, as reported earlier by The Hollywood Reporter . Dreams of Violets cost $2,000 to make and is "based on journalistic reports, photographs, and eyewitness accounts," according to a press release . It was created by Ash and Pooya Koosha, two brothers who left Iran in 2009. Pooya cofounded Fountain 0, the company behind the film, while As…
items.why_zh: 这部低成本AI电影在知名电影节首映，展示了AI在影视创作中的潜力，引发对AI伦理和艺术价值的讨论。
items.why_en: This low-budget AI film premiering at a major festival showcases AI's potential in filmmaking, sparking debates on AI ethics and artistic value.

items.title_zh: CNN起诉Perplexity抄袭文章
items.title_en: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
items.summary_zh: CNN于周四在纽约法院对AI搜索初创公司Perplexity提起诉讼，指控其AI工具“逐字”复制CNN的新闻报道。诉讼称，Perplexity不仅生成与CNN文章几乎相同的摘要，还向用户提供CNN付费墙后的内容。CNN表示，Perplexity无视其阻止爬虫抓取内容的措施，未经授权使用其受版权保护的新闻作品。此案凸显了AI公司与内容创作者之间关于版权和合理使用的持续争议。
items.summary_en: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN . The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Thursday , also alleges that Perplexity provides users with information locked behind CNN's subscription. Perplexity, which offers an AI "answer" engine along with the AI browser Comet, is accused of ignoring CNN's efforts "to recognize or block Perplexity's unidentified crawlers" from scraping its content. "Human beings report, research, write, edit, and create the content that Perplexity takes without p…
items.why_zh: 此案可能为AI公司使用新闻内容设立法律先例，影响整个AI搜索和内容生成行业。
items.why_en: This case could set a legal precedent for how AI companies use news content, impacting the entire AI search and content generation industry.

items.title_zh: Rivian软件主管：无需CarPlay或物理按钮
items.title_en: Rivian’s software chief thinks you don’t need CarPlay or buttons
items.summary_zh: Rivian首席软件官Wassym Bensaid在接受采访时表示，其车辆无需Apple CarPlay或物理按钮，因为Rivian的软件系统已足够强大。Bensaid还负责大众汽车集团与Rivian的合资企业RV Tech，该合资企业获得了大众近60亿美元投资，旨在为大众旗下品牌（包括奥迪、Scout等）开发操作系统和电气架构。他强调，Rivian的软件设计注重简洁和直观，未来将应用于更多车型。
items.summary_en: Today, I’m talking with Wassym Bensaid, the chief software officer at Rivian, and the co-CEO of Rivian’s platform joint venture with Volkswagen, which everyone just calls RV Tech. That joint venture kicked off about a year and a half ago with a nearly $6 billion investment from Volkswagen. It effectively puts Wassym in charge of the operating system and electrical architecture for every future EV from Volkswagen and its associated brands, including familiar names like Audi, but also new companies like Scout. There’s a lot of Decoder ideas in there — I really wanted to know how that joint ventu…
items.why_zh: 这表明汽车行业正从第三方系统转向自研软件，可能改变车载信息娱乐和控制的未来。
items.why_en: This signals a shift in the auto industry toward proprietary software, potentially reshaping in-car infotainment and controls.

items.title_zh: IBM and Red Hat Commit $5 Billion to Redefine the Future of Open Source in the AI Era
items.title_en: IBM and Red Hat Commit $5 Billion to Redefine the Future of Open Source in the AI Era
items.summary_zh: IBM and Red Hat Commit $5 Billion to Redefine the Future of Open Source in the AI Era IBM Newsroom
items.summary_en: IBM and Red Hat have committed $5 billion to redefine open source in the AI era, focusing on developing open-source AI tools and platforms for enterprise solutions.
items.why_zh: 这笔巨额投资表明开源在AI领域的重要性日益增加，可能加速企业AI的采用和创新。
items.why_en: This massive investment underscores the growing importance of open source in AI, potentially accelerating enterprise AI adoption and innovation.

items.title_zh: Show HN：开源AI赛车模拟器
items.title_en: Show HN: Open-Source AI Racing Harness
items.summary_zh: Elodin公司的Dan发布了一款开源实时飞行软件模拟器，专为AI大奖赛参赛者设计。该模拟器符合比赛约束条件和消息格式，可运行真实的Betaflight固件，需要每秒至少1000个传感器样本才能正确实时运行。它还引入了在模拟循环中直接生成相机传感器的新功能，帮助参赛者在正式虚拟资格赛前进行训练和测试。
items.summary_en: Hi I'm Dan from Elodin, making an open source real-time capable flight software simulation. For AI Grand Prix contestants, the wait for the Round 1 virtual qualifier simulation has been grueling. If you’re competing, check out our simulation harness to tide you over, built to match the published competition constraints and message format. It runs against real Betaflight, which we learned requires at least 1000 sensor samples per second to run real-time correctly. The competition warranted introducing a new feature to generate the camera sensor directly in the simulation loop. Typically people…
items.why_zh: 该工具为AI竞赛参与者提供了宝贵的训练资源，可能提升比赛质量和AI飞行控制技术的发展。
items.why_en: This tool provides valuable training resources for AI competition participants, potentially improving competition quality and AI flight control development.

items.title_zh: Kordata推出神经聚焦AI临床试验模型
items.title_en: Kordata launches with neural-focused AI clinical trial model
items.summary_zh: Kordata公司正式启动，推出了一款专注于神经科学的AI临床试验模型。该模型利用人工智能优化临床试验设计，特别是在神经系统疾病领域，旨在提高试验效率、降低成本并加速新疗法开发。Kordata的AI平台可分析大量数据，识别患者群体、预测结果并优化试验方案。
items.summary_en: Kordata launches with neural-focused AI clinical trial model Fierce Biotech
items.why_zh: AI在临床试验中的应用有望显著加速神经系统疾病的药物开发，改善患者治疗前景。
items.why_en: AI in clinical trials could significantly accelerate drug development for neurological diseases, improving patient outcomes.

items.title_zh: 观点：美国如何保持AI超级大国地位
items.title_en: Opinion | How America can remain the world’s AI superpower
items.summary_zh: 《华盛顿邮报》发表评论文章，探讨美国如何维持其全球AI领导地位。文章指出，美国需在投资基础研究、培养人才、制定明智的监管政策以及加强国际合作等方面采取行动。同时，要应对中国等国家的竞争，确保美国在AI创新和部署方面保持优势。
items.summary_en: Opinion | How America can remain the world’s AI superpower The Washington Post
items.why_zh: 这篇文章反映了美国对AI领导地位的焦虑，其政策建议可能影响全球AI竞争格局。
items.why_en: This article reflects U.S. concerns about AI leadership, and its policy suggestions could influence the global AI competitive landscape.

items.title_zh: 除了利润，还有什么能引导AI？OpenAI审判提供线索但无定论
items.title_en: Could anything but profit steer AI? The OpenAI trial offered clues but no verdict
items.summary_zh: 美联社报道了OpenAI相关审判，该审判探讨了非营利使命与营利动机之间的张力。案件涉及OpenAI的治理结构及其是否偏离了最初的非营利目标。虽然审判未给出明确裁决，但揭示了AI行业在追求利润与保持公益之间的根本矛盾。此案可能影响未来AI公司的治理模式。
items.summary_en: Could anything but profit steer AI? The OpenAI trial offered clues but no verdict AP News
items.why_zh: 此案凸显了AI治理中的核心矛盾，可能影响未来AI公司的结构和监管方向。
items.why_en: This case highlights a core tension in AI governance, potentially shaping future AI company structures and regulations.

items.title_zh: 网络安全领域的AI军备竞赛已经开始，大多数公司尚未做好准备
items.title_en: The AI arms race in cybersecurity has started. Most companies aren’t ready
items.summary_zh: 《财富》杂志报道称，网络安全领域的AI军备竞赛已经拉开帷幕，但大多数公司尚未做好准备。攻击者正在利用AI发动更复杂的网络攻击，而防御方则需加快采用AI技术来应对。文章指出，企业需要投资AI驱动的安全工具、培训员工并制定新策略，否则将面临更大的安全风险。
items.summary_en: The AI arms race in cybersecurity has started. Most companies aren’t ready Fortune
items.why_zh: AI在网络安全中的双刃剑效应意味着企业必须迅速适应，否则可能面临严重的数据泄露和业务中断。
items.why_en: The dual-use nature of AI in cybersecurity means companies must adapt quickly or face severe data breaches and business disruptions.

items.title_zh: 你可能已经在投资AI
items.title_en: You’re probably already invested in AI
items.summary_zh: 据《伯克希尔鹰报》报道，许多普通投资者可能并未意识到自己已经通过养老金、共同基金或指数基金间接投资了人工智能公司。文章指出，AI技术已深度融入主流投资组合，例如标普500指数中科技巨头权重较高，而这些公司正大力布局AI。投资者无需主动选择AI股票，即可从AI增长中获益。这一现象凸显了AI对全球经济的广泛渗透，以及普通民众与AI产业的隐性关联。
items.summary_en: You’re probably already invested in AI The Berkshire Eagle
items.why_zh: 揭示AI已广泛渗透普通人的投资组合，影响个人财富。
items.why_en: Reveals how AI has widely penetrated ordinary people's investment portfolios, affecting personal wealth.

items.title_zh: AI、尽职调查与新IRS
items.title_en: AI, due diligence and the new IRS
items.summary_zh: 《今日会计》文章探讨了人工智能如何改变税务和会计领域的尽职调查流程。随着美国国税局（IRS）现代化，AI被用于审计、欺诈检测和合规分析。文章强调，会计师需要适应AI工具以提高效率，同时注意数据隐私和算法偏见。AI的应用可能重塑税务行业，但专业判断仍不可或缺。
items.summary_en: AI, due diligence and the new IRS Accounting Today
items.why_zh: AI正在重塑税务行业，影响会计师工作方式和IRS监管效率。
items.why_en: AI is reshaping the tax industry, affecting how accountants work and IRS regulatory efficiency.

items.title_zh: Jorge R. Gutierrez因争议放弃在Amazon MGM制作AI生成动画系列
items.title_en: Jorge R. Gutierrez Won’t Make AI-Generated ‘Punky Duck’ Series at Amazon MGM After Backlash
items.summary_zh: 据IndieWire报道，动画师Jorge R. Gutierrez宣布放弃在Amazon MGM制作AI生成的《Punky Duck》系列，此前该项目引发强烈反对。批评者认为使用AI生成动画会取代人类艺术家，并涉及版权问题。Gutierrez最初计划利用AI工具辅助创作，但最终决定尊重社区意见，停止该项目。此事反映了AI在创意产业中引发的伦理争议。
items.summary_en: Jorge R. Gutierrez Won’t Make AI-Generated ‘Punky Duck’ Series at Amazon MGM After Backlash IndieWire
items.why_zh: 凸显AI在创意产业中取代人类艺术家的伦理争议。
items.why_en: Highlights ethical controversies over AI replacing human artists in creative industries.

items.title_zh: AI招聘同质化导致大规模种族偏见
items.title_en: AI hiring monoculture is delivering racial bias at scale
items.summary_zh: 《计算机世界》文章指出，AI招聘工具的同质化正在大规模放大种族偏见。许多公司使用相似的AI筛选系统，这些系统基于历史数据训练，可能继承并固化种族歧视。例如，某些算法对少数族裔候选人的评分偏低，导致就业机会不平等。文章呼吁企业审查AI招聘流程，确保公平性，并建议监管介入。
items.summary_en: AI hiring monoculture is delivering racial bias at scale Computerworld
items.why_zh: 揭示AI招聘系统可能系统性加剧种族歧视，影响就业公平。
items.why_en: Reveals how AI hiring systems may systematically exacerbate racial discrimination, affecting employment equity.

items.title_zh: 《宝可梦GO》开发商希望用你的无人机照片训练AI
items.title_en: Pokémon Go creator wants your drone photos to train AI
items.summary_zh: 据DroneDJ报道，《宝可梦GO》开发商Niantic计划收集用户无人机拍摄的照片，用于训练AI模型。这些照片将帮助改进空间理解和3D地图构建，可能用于增强现实（AR）应用。Niantic强调数据将匿名化处理，但隐私担忧依然存在。此举展示了游戏公司如何利用用户生成内容推动AI发展。
items.summary_en: Pokémon Go creator wants your drone photos to train AI DroneDJ
items.why_zh: 展示游戏公司如何利用用户数据训练AI，引发隐私与数据使用讨论。
items.why_en: Shows how game companies use user data to train AI, sparking discussions on privacy and data usage.

items.title_zh: Anthropic如何以9650亿美元估值超越OpenAI
items.title_en: How Anthropic Overtook OpenAI with US$965bn Valuation
items.summary_zh: 据《AI杂志》报道，AI初创公司Anthropic估值达到9650亿美元，超越OpenAI成为行业新贵。Anthropic由前OpenAI员工创立，专注于AI安全研究。其成功得益于Claude模型的技术突破、企业客户增长以及投资者对安全AI的青睐。这一估值反映了市场对负责任AI开发的强烈需求，也加剧了AI领域的竞争。
items.summary_en: How Anthropic Overtook OpenAI with US$965bn Valuation AI Magazine
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI，标志AI安全领域崛起和行业格局变化。
items.why_en: Anthropic's valuation surpassing OpenAI marks the rise of AI safety and a shift in industry landscape.

items.title_zh: Meta的Andrew Rudersdorf加入Anthropic数据中心能源团队
items.title_en: Meta's Andrew Rudersdorf joins Anthropic's data center energy team
items.summary_zh: 据Data Center Dynamics报道，Meta前能源战略负责人Andrew Rudersdorf加入Anthropic，负责数据中心能源管理。此举表明Anthropic正加速扩张其AI基础设施，并关注可持续能源。Rudersdorf在Meta的经验将帮助Anthropic优化数据中心能效，支持其大规模AI模型训练。人才流动凸显了AI公司对能源专家的需求。
items.summary_en: Meta's Andrew Rudersdorf joins Anthropic's data center energy team Data Center Dynamics
items.why_zh: 显示AI公司对能源管理人才的争夺，以及可持续AI基础设施的重要性。
items.why_en: Shows competition for energy management talent among AI companies and the importance of sustainable AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 加州州长纽森签署行政令应对AI经济影响
items.title_en: Governor Newsom Signs Executive Order To Confront Economic Impacts of AI
items.summary_zh: 据CDF Labor Law LLP报道，加州州长加文·纽森签署行政令，要求州政府机构评估AI对就业、经济和公共服务的潜在影响，并制定应对策略。该命令旨在平衡AI创新与工人保护，包括研究AI对劳动力市场的冲击、促进AI教育，以及确保政府负责任地使用AI。此举反映了美国州级政府对AI监管的积极态度。
items.summary_en: Governor Newsom Signs Executive Order To Confront Economic Impacts of AI CDF Labor Law LLP
items.why_zh: 加州作为科技中心，其AI监管政策可能影响全美乃至全球AI发展走向。
items.why_en: As a tech hub, California's AI regulatory policy may influence AI development nationwide and globally.

items.title_zh: 公关AI更新：AI最大的机遇不是内容创作
items.title_en: PR AI Update: Why AI's Biggest Opportunity isn't Content Creation
items.summary_zh: PRovoke Media的一篇文章指出，人工智能在公关领域的最大机遇并非内容创作，而是其他方面。文章认为，AI在数据分析、受众洞察和策略优化方面具有更大潜力，能够帮助公关专业人士更有效地制定传播策略。虽然AI生成内容的能力备受关注，但其真正的价值在于提升决策效率和精准度。这一观点挑战了当前对AI内容创作的热衷，强调公关行业应更关注AI在战略层面的应用。
items.summary_en: PR AI Update: Why AI's Biggest Opportunity isn't Content Creation PRovoke Media
items.why_zh: 该观点挑战了AI内容创作的主流叙事，引导公关行业重新思考AI的战略价值。
items.why_en: This perspective challenges the mainstream narrative of AI content creation, guiding the PR industry to rethink AI's strategic value.

items.title_zh: 教皇挑战算法：“人工智能必须被解除武装”
items.title_en: The Pope who challenges algorithms: “Artificial Intelligence must be disarmed”
items.summary_zh: 据exaudi.org报道，教皇方济各在最新讲话中呼吁对人工智能进行伦理约束，强调“人工智能必须被解除武装”。教皇指出，AI的发展不应脱离人类价值观，必须防止其被用于战争或侵犯人权。他呼吁国际社会制定规则，确保AI服务于和平与共同利益。这一表态反映了宗教领袖对AI伦理问题的深切关注。
items.summary_en: The Pope who challenges algorithms: “Artificial Intelligence must be disarmed” exaudi.org
items.why_zh: 教皇的呼吁凸显了AI伦理问题的紧迫性，可能影响全球AI治理的讨论。
items.why_en: The Pope's call highlights the urgency of AI ethics and may influence global AI governance discussions.

items.title_zh: Anthropic超越OpenAI成为全球最有价值的AI公司
items.title_en: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI to become world's most valuable AI company
items.summary_zh: 据Mashable报道，AI初创公司Anthropic在最新一轮融资后估值飙升，超越OpenAI成为全球最有价值的AI公司。Anthropic以其安全导向的AI模型Claude而闻名，此次估值增长反映了投资者对负责任AI发展的信心。这一变化标志着AI行业竞争格局的重大转变，OpenAI长期以来的领先地位受到挑战。
items.summary_en: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI to become world's most valuable AI company Mashable
items.why_zh: Anthropic的崛起表明市场对安全AI的重视，可能重塑AI行业的竞争格局。
items.why_en: Anthropic's rise signals market emphasis on safe AI, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape of the AI industry.

items.title_zh: H1获得4000万美元融资，用于AI医疗保健提供者目录
items.title_en: H1 secures $40M in funding for its AI healthcare provider directory
items.summary_zh: 据MobiHealthNews报道，医疗科技公司H1成功获得4000万美元融资，用于扩展其AI驱动的医疗保健提供者目录。该目录利用AI技术帮助医疗机构和患者更高效地查找和匹配医生、专家及医疗资源。这笔资金将用于产品开发、市场拓展和增强AI能力，以改善医疗服务的可及性和效率。
items.summary_en: H1 secures $40M in funding for its AI healthcare provider directory MobiHealthNews
items.why_zh: 该融资表明AI在医疗资源匹配领域的应用前景广阔，有望提升医疗服务的效率。
items.why_en: The funding highlights the promising application of AI in healthcare resource matching, potentially improving healthcare efficiency.

items.title_zh: AI技术改进乳腺癌和前列腺癌的癌症基因发现
items.title_en: AI technique improves cancer gene discovery for breast and prostate cancer
items.summary_zh: 据Vanderbilt Health News报道，范德比尔特大学的研究人员开发了一种新的AI技术，能够更有效地识别与乳腺癌和前列腺癌相关的基因。该技术通过分析大量基因组数据，提高了发现致癌基因的准确性和速度。这一突破有望加速癌症诊断和个性化治疗的发展，为患者带来更好的预后。
items.summary_en: AI technique improves cancer gene discovery for breast and prostate cancer Vanderbilt Health News
items.why_zh: 该AI技术有望加速癌症基因研究，推动精准医疗的发展。
items.why_en: This AI technique could accelerate cancer gene research and advance precision medicine.

items.title_zh: CreateMe CEO：物理AI已准备好更广泛地应用于某些领域
items.title_en: Physical AI is ready for wider adoption in some applications: CreateMe CEO
items.summary_zh: 据Manufacturing Dive报道，CreateMe公司CEO表示，物理AI（Physical AI）已准备好更广泛地应用于某些制造领域。物理AI指的是能够与物理世界交互的AI系统，如机器人和自动化设备。CEO指出，在特定任务中，物理AI已经足够成熟，可以提升生产效率和灵活性。这一观点预示着制造业中AI应用的新阶段。
items.summary_en: Physical AI is ready for wider adoption in some applications: CreateMe CEO Manufacturing Dive
items.why_zh: 物理AI的成熟应用可能推动制造业的智能化转型，提升生产效率。
items.why_en: The maturity of Physical AI could drive intelligent transformation in manufacturing, boosting productivity.

items.title_zh: 2026年人工智能如何改变牙科：AI驱动牙科护理的未来
items.title_en: How Artificial Intelligence Is Transforming Dentistry in 2026: The Future of AI Powered Dental Care
items.summary_zh: 据Rebellion Research报道，文章展望了2026年人工智能在牙科领域的变革作用。AI技术预计将在诊断、治疗规划和患者管理等方面发挥关键作用，例如通过图像识别检测龋齿和牙周病，以及辅助机器人进行精准手术。AI驱动的牙科护理有望提高诊疗准确性、减少患者等待时间，并降低医疗成本。
items.summary_en: How Artificial Intelligence Is Transforming Dentistry in 2026: The Future of AI Powered Dental Care Rebellion Research
items.why_zh: AI在牙科的应用预示了医疗领域更广泛的智能化趋势，可能改善患者体验和医疗效率。
items.why_en: AI in dentistry signals broader intelligent transformation in healthcare, potentially improving patient experience and efficiency.

items.title_zh: 大规模可靠的大语言模型推理
items.title_en: Reliable LLM Inference at Scale
items.summary_zh: Databricks发布文章探讨如何实现大规模可靠的大语言模型（LLM）推理。文章介绍了在分布式系统中部署LLM时面临的挑战，如延迟、吞吐量和准确性，并提出了一系列优化策略，包括模型压缩、缓存和负载均衡。这些技术旨在确保LLM在生产环境中能够稳定高效地运行，满足企业级应用的需求。
items.summary_en: Reliable LLM Inference at Scale Databricks
items.why_zh: 大规模LLM推理的可靠性是企业级AI应用的关键，该文章提供了实用的技术指导。
items.why_en: Reliable LLM inference at scale is crucial for enterprise AI applications, and this article offers practical technical guidance.

items.title_zh: Filmmaker Jorge Gutierrez Drops Plans for AI-Generated Series Funded by Amazon MGM Studios After Backlash
items.title_en: Filmmaker Jorge Gutierrez Drops AI Series Plans After Backlash
items.summary_zh: Filmmaker Jorge Gutierrez Drops Plans for AI-Generated Series Funded by Amazon MGM Studios After Backlash Variety
items.summary_en: Filmmaker Jorge Gutierrez has abandoned plans for an AI-generated series funded by Amazon MGM Studios after public backlash. The decision highlights ongoing controversies over AI's role in creative industries.
items.why_zh: 此事凸显AI在创意产业中引发的伦理与就业担忧，以及公众舆论对技术应用的重要影响。
items.why_en: This highlights ethical and employment concerns around AI in creative industries and the power of public opinion.

items.title_zh: Dell shares soar 33% as AI server demand, price hikes power stellar quarter
items.title_en: Dell Shares Surge 33% on AI Server Demand and Price Hikes
items.summary_zh: Dell shares soar 33% as AI server demand, price hikes power stellar quarter Reuters
items.summary_en: Dell shares jumped 33% after reporting stellar quarterly results driven by strong AI server demand and price increases. The company's infrastructure solutions segment outperformed expectations.
items.why_zh: 戴尔的强劲业绩表明AI基础设施需求正在爆发，对科技硬件厂商构成重大利好。
items.why_en: Dell's strong results signal booming demand for AI infrastructure, benefiting hardware vendors.

items.title_zh: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
items.title_en: CertiK CEO Warns Mass AI Agent Deployment Could Be a Disaster
items.summary_zh: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO CoinDesk
items.summary_en: CertiK's CEO warns that mass deployment of AI agents could lead to disasters due to lack of robustness and security. He calls for stricter testing and regulation before deployment in critical sectors.
items.why_zh: 此警告凸显AI安全问题的紧迫性，尤其是在关键基础设施中部署AI代理的风险。
items.why_en: This warning underscores the urgency of AI safety, especially for deploying AI agents in critical infrastructure.

items.title_zh: Anthropic融资650亿美元，估值9650亿美元超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic secures $65B, overtakes OpenAI with $965B valuation
items.summary_zh: AI初创公司Anthropic宣布完成650亿美元融资，估值达到9650亿美元，超越竞争对手OpenAI。本轮融资由多家顶级风投机构参与，资金将用于开发更安全、更先进的AI模型。Anthropic由前OpenAI员工创立，专注于AI安全研究。此次融资规模创下AI领域新高，标志着投资者对AI安全方向的强烈信心。
items.summary_en: Anthropic secures $65B, overtakes OpenAI with $965B valuation MSN
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI，表明AI安全领域正获得资本市场的巨大认可。
items.why_en: Anthropic's valuation surpassing OpenAI shows strong market confidence in AI safety.
